Elephant Charge 2011

23 October 2011 · 📍 Chifomoshi River Luano Valley

22 Entries
14 Completed
64% Finish rate
$80,437 Raised
10 Checkpoints
3× Gauntlet mult.
Results Checkpoints Awards Grants 🗺 Map

Net distance = competition distance minus penalties. Shorter net distance = better result. Gauntlet checkpoints carry a ×3 distance penalty.

Spirit of the Charge

Sanctuary — They walked from a kilometre out of Barloworld, to Headquarters at Midday in 40 degree heat, carrying 3 tyres in rope slings on their backs. One of them on his first trip to Africa only 3 days out of winter Prague. They refused the offer of labour to carry their tyres back in offered to change the marshalls flat tyre and they walked the tyres back to their vehicle and returned to Headquarters without any assistance.

Elephant Charge results archive — data updated annually after each event.
